div.head: The Consul General at Shanghai (Cunningham) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 189. For Morgenthau from Rogers. T. V. SoongMember of standing committee of Chinese National Economic Council. last week took position United States Government could not undertake alone raising world price silver as too great purchases might be required. Minister of Finance Kung is publicly committed to stability silver price.
Account demand for stability by important groups already reported believe Nanking Government would welcome some plan assuring future stability silver price in terms of major currencies. [Rogers.]
